title: Throwing Target Garden
description: A friendly throwing clinic with homemade targets, underhand lobs, distance practice, and a wacky trick-shot finale.
learningGoals: Practice underhand throwing mechanics before harder throws
Control aim and throwing force across different distances
Coordinate an opposite-foot step with a throw
Celebrate near-misses and take turns warmly
interactionModel: follow spoken throwing missions with real soft objects and tap the large completed step after each practice station
feedbackModel: upbeat spoken coaching with sparkle/tick/tada SFX; hits and near-misses both receive energetic encouragement

modes.title: Throwing Clinic
modes.skill: throwing mechanics, aim, and force control

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
